items.title: OpenAI’s existential questions
items.summary: TechCrunch explores the internal and external challenges facing OpenAI as it navigates its mission and commercial pressures.

items.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
items.summary: Salesforce launches an enhanced Slackbot AI agent, intensifying its competition with Microsoft and Google in the enterprise AI market.

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: Google announces new features for Google Vids, allowing users to create, edit, and share videos using AI-powered tools for free.

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google is developing an AI-powered satellite imagery map to monitor and protect Brazil's forests from deforestation.

items.title: SemaClaw: A Step Towards General-Purpose Personal AI Agents through Harness Engineering
items.summary: A new research paper proposes SemaClaw, a system designed to advance general-purpose personal AI agents by focusing on robust harness engineering.

items.title: HiVLA: A Visual-Grounded-Centric Hierarchical Embodied Manipulation System
items.summary: Researchers introduce HiVLA, a hierarchical system for embodied AI that leverages visual grounding to perform complex manipulation tasks.

items.title: Dive into Claude Code: The Design Space of Today's and Future AI Agent Systems
items.summary: A new paper explores the design principles and future directions for AI agent systems, focusing on the capabilities exemplified by Claude Code.

items.title: The 12-month window
items.summary: TechCrunch discusses the critical short-term period for AI companies to establish market dominance and innovation before competition intensifies.

items.title: Palantir posts mini-manifesto denouncing inclusivity and ‘regressive’ cultures
items.summary: Palantir releases a controversial statement criticizing certain cultural trends, sparking debate about corporate values in the tech industry.

items.title: Target Policy Optimization
items.summary: A new research paper introduces Target Policy Optimization, a novel method for reinforcement learning aiming for more stable and efficient training.

items.title: EM Operating System: Your Brain Is a Terrible Database
items.summary: This article discusses the concept of an 'EM Operating System' as a framework for externalizing and managing information, suggesting AI could augment human memory and cognitive functions.

items.title: LangFlow: Continuous Diffusion Rivals Discrete in Language Modeling
items.summary: A new paper introduces LangFlow, demonstrating that continuous diffusion models can rival discrete models in language modeling tasks.

items.title: ROSE: An Intent-Centered Evaluation Metric for NL2SQL
items.summary: Researchers propose ROSE, a new intent-centered evaluation metric designed to better assess the performance of Natural Language to SQL (NL2SQL) systems.

items.title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
items.summary: Google highlights its participation in the AI for the Economy Forum, emphasizing collaboration and the economic impact of AI.

items.title: Healthcare
items.summary: OpenAI shares insights and initiatives regarding the application of AI in the healthcare sector, outlining potential benefits and challenges.
